project_identity.name: Welding Training Platform
project_identity.emotional_tone: Authoritative, Tactile, Precision-Oriented, Safe, High-End Engineering
project_identity.target_audience: Novice welding students and professionals in France

headings.usage: Page titles, Section headers, Hero text

mono.usage: Technical specs, Numerical data, Code snippets

layout_strategy.grid_system: Bento Grid (Mode A for Marketing, Mode B for Data)

buttons.primary: bg-[#e8823a] text-white hover:bg-[#fb923c] rounded-none uppercase tracking-widest font-bold px-8 py-3 transition-all duration-300 shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(232,130,58,0.3)] hover:shadow-[0_0_25px_rgba(232,130,58,0.5)]
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-white/20 text-white hover:border-[#e8823a] hover:text-[#e8823a] rounded-none uppercase tracking-widest px-8 py-3 transition-all duration-300

cards.industrial: bg-[#1a1d22] border border-white/10 p-6 relative overflow-hidden group hover:border-[#e8823a]/50 transition-colors duration-300

inputs.default: bg-[#0f1012] border border-white/10 focus:border-[#e8823a] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#e8823a] rounded-none text-white placeholder:text-gray-600

navigation.sidebar_link: flex items-center gap-3 px-4 py-3 text-gray-400 hover:text-white hover:bg-white/5 border-l-2 border-transparent hover:border-[#e8823a] transition-all duration-200 font-medium

textures.grid: linear-gradient(to right, #272a30 1px, transparent 1px), linear-gradient(to bottom, #272a30 1px, transparent 1px)

media.image_style: High contrast, desaturated background with selective saturation on fire/sparks. Sharp edges. No rounded corners greater than 4px.
media.video_embeds: 16:9 aspect ratio, minimal controls, custom poster image

setup: Install dependencies: npm install react-router-dom lucide-react framer-motion clsx tailwind-merge @radix-ui/react-slot tsparticles @tsparticles/react @tsparticles/slim
Configure Tailwind colors in tailwind.config.js to match the 'colors' section exactly.
Add 'Bebas Neue' and 'IBM Plex Sans' from Google Fonts to index.css.
implementation_rules: Use the Sidebar Layout as the main shell for the application.
Ensure all interactive elements have hover states defined in the 'components' section.
Use the 'Bento Grid' strategy for the 'Other Processes', 'Tools', and 'History' sections.
Implement the 'Sparks' effect ONLY on the Hero section of the Home page to avoid performance issues.
All text MUST be in French as per the problem statement.
accessibility_check: Ensure all images have alt text in French.
Check contrast ratios for orange text on dark backgrounds (use larger font sizes if needed).
All interactive elements must be keyboard navigable.

UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms.
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; } in the css file.
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style.
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭💡🔮🎯📚🎭🎬🎪🎉🎊🎁🎀🎂🍰🎈🎨🎰💰💵💳🏦💎🪙💸🤑📊📈📉💹🔢🏆🥇 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories (especially sponsor logos) = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable.
Components MUST use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...).
Pages MUST use default exports (export default function PageName() {...}).
